# PCPD Guidance on Data Breach Handling and Notification

Jurisdiction: Hong Kong SAR
Region: HK
Citation: Guidance on Data Breach Handling and Data Breach Notifications
Authority: Privacy Commissioner for Personal Data Hong Kong
Source URL: https://www.pcpd.org.hk/english/resources_centre/publications/files/DataBreachHandling2023_e.pdf
Topics: security_breach, notice_transparency, accountability
Keywords: PCPD data breach guidance, Hong Kong breach notification, incident response

## Summary
Hong Kong PCPD guidance on handling data breaches and notifying affected individuals and the Commissioner.

## Key compliance obligations
- Assess breach severity and containment steps.
- Consider notification to PCPD and affected individuals.
- Document response and remedial measures.
